# Populate the palette, assert it lists back, and verify tag add respects membership.

exec kcm tag palette list
stdout 'palette is empty'

exec kcm tag palette add prod staging critical
stdout 'added to palette: prod, staging, critical'

exec kcm tag palette list
stdout 'prod'
stdout 'staging'
stdout 'critical'

# Tag add against a seeded kubeconfig — unknown tag is rejected.
mkdir $WORK/kube
cp $WORK/prod.yaml $WORK/kube/prod.yaml

! exec kcm tag add prod unknown-tag --dir $WORK/kube
stderr 'not in palette'

# --allow-new extends the palette on the fly.
exec kcm tag add prod emergency --allow-new --dir $WORK/kube
stdout 'added to palette: emergency'

exec kcm tag palette list
stdout 'emergency'

# Remove scrubs from palette and from entries.
exec kcm tag palette remove critical
stdout 'removed from palette'

exec kcm tag palette list
! stdout 'critical'

-- prod.yaml --
apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
current-context: prod-eu
clusters:
  - name: prod-eu-cluster
    cluster:
      server: https://prod-eu.example.test
contexts:
  - name: prod-eu
    context:
      cluster: prod-eu-cluster
      user: prod-admin
users:
  - name: prod-admin
    user:
      token: test
